allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\mcp.json"\) { Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\mcp.json" } elseif \(Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\Claude\\claude_desktop_config.json"\) { Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\Claude\\claude_desktop_config.json" } else { "\(no MCP config found\)" })

PowerShell($desktopConfig = Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\Claude\\claude_desktop_config.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $clientId = $desktopConfig.mcpServers."mongodb-mcp-server".env.MDB_MCP_API_CLIENT_ID; $clientSecret = $desktopConfig.mcpServers."mongodb-mcp-server".env.MDB_MCP_API_CLIENT_SECRET; $mcpConfig = @{ mcpServers = @{ "mongodb-mcp-server" = @{ command = "npx"; args = @\("-y", "@mongodb-js/mongodb-mcp-server@latest"\); env = @{ MDB_MCP_API_CLIENT_ID = $clientId; MDB_MCP_API_CLIENT_SECRET = $clientSecret } } } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; $mcpConfig | Out-File -FilePath "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\mcp.json" -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "Written successfully")
PowerShell($env:MDB_MCP_CONNECTION_STRING | Select-String "mongodb" | ForEach-Object { if \($_\) { "connection string está definida" } else { "não definida" } })
